title.en: How to Send OTP Without DLT Registration - Step by Step Guide

description.en: Complete guide to sending OTPs in India without DLT registration. Step-by-step tutorial with code examples in Node.js, Python, PHP, Java, and Go.

title.en: How to Send OTP Without DLT Registration

subtitle.en: A step-by-step guide to sending OTPs in India without any DLT setup. From account creation to your first API call in 5 minutes.

description.en: Sign up at app.startmessaging.com with your email. No company documents or KYC required to get started.
Go to the API Keys page in your dashboard and click 'Create API Key'. Copy the key — it is shown only once. The key starts with the sm_live_ prefix.
Add funds to your wallet via Razorpay (UPI, cards, netbanking). Each OTP costs Rs 0.25.
Make a POST request to /otp/send with the phone number. We generate and deliver the OTP via SMS in under 2 seconds. See the code examples below.
When your user enters the OTP, call POST /v1/otp/verify with the OTP request ID and the code. We handle validation, expiry, and attempt limits.

badge.en: Send an OTP in One API Call

heading.en: Works with every language. Just a single POST request.

question.en: Do I need any documents to sign up?

answer.en: No. You can sign up with just an email address. No company registration, PAN card, GST certificate, or any other documents are required.

question.en: What phone number format should I use?

answer.en: Use E.164 format: country code + number. For India, that is +91 followed by the 10-digit mobile number. Example: +919876543210.

question.en: How many OTPs can I send per second?

answer.en: We support up to 20 OTPs per second globally per account. This ensures high throughput for production applications during peak times.

question.en: How long does an OTP remain valid?

answer.en: OTPs expire after a configurable time window. The default expiry ensures security while giving users enough time to receive and enter the code.

question.en: What happens if SMS delivery fails?

answer.en: StartMessaging automatically retries with a backup SMS provider. We only retry on service errors (5xx or timeout), not on validation errors like invalid phone numbers.

heading.en: Ready to Send Your First OTP?

subtext.en: Follow the steps above and go live in under 5 minutes. No DLT registration needed.
